scripts.clean: powershell -Command "if (Test-Path -LiteralPath '.next') { Remove-Item -LiteralPath '.next' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if (Test-Path -LiteralPath 'node_modules\\.cache') { Remove-Item -LiteralPath 'node_modules\\.cache' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }"
scripts.reinstall: npm run clean && powershell -Command "if (Test-Path -LiteralPath 'node_modules') { Remove-Item -LiteralPath 'node_modules' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }" && npm install
